case_title: REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA,CALIF CORP vs. CAL-WESTERN FARMING OCMPANY, A CALIF CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA,CALIF CORP SERVED APR-12-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAL-WESTERN FARMING OCMPANY, A CALIF CORPORATION
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO EXTEND TIME FOR RESPONSE TIME EXTENDED TO AND INCLUDING JUNE 9, 1994 TO RESPOND TO COMPLAINT. FIRST APPEARANCE FEES PAID FOR CAL-WESTERN FARMING CO.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA,CALIF CORP AS TO DEFENDANT CAL-WESTERN FARMING OCMPANY, A CALIF CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-29-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-31-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-11-1994
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1994, CONTINUED TO AUG-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT OR ANSWER BY 8/24/94. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
